nasb.text: Do not trust in a neighbor; Do not have confidence in a friend. From her who lies in your bosom Guard your lips.

esv.text: Put no trust in a neighbor; have no confidence in a friend; guard the doors of your mouth from her who lies in your arms;

cnv.text: 不可信靠鄰舍， 也不可信任朋友， 要守住你的嘴唇， 不可向躺在你懷中的妻子透露。

ccb.text: 不要相信邻居， 不要信赖朋友， 即使对你怀中的妻子也要守口如瓶。
